meaning: n.利古里亚人,意大利土语adj.利古里亚人[语]的
examples: A city of north-central Italy near the Ligurian Sea north of Leghorn.
The island of Corsica is visible in the Ligurian Sea to the south (image top).
A river in central Italy rising in the apennines and flowing through Florence and Pisa to the ligurian sea.
It is here that the Apennine Mountains drop a thousand feet straight down into the turquoise Ligurian Sea .
Five protected villages cling limpet-like to the Ligurian coast, joined together by footpaths and overlooking a marine reserve that sparkles like diamonds.
